title: Smoky Light Malaysian Fish Ceviche
description: A refreshing raw fish ceviche with smoky paprika, caramelized pineapple, and crisp cucumber relish, perfect for a lazy Sunday in Malaysia.

ingredients.name: Fresh snapper fillet
ingredients.notes: Dice into 1 cm cubes (use sashimi‑grade fish)

ingredients.name: Caramelized pineapple chunks
ingredients.notes: caramelized in a little oil, 2 min

ingredients.name: Diced cucumber relish
ingredients.notes: made from diced cucumber, vinegar, and a pinch of sugar

instructions: Dice the snapper fillet into 1 cm cubes and place in a bowl.
Add lime juice, smoked paprika, sea salt, fish sauce, and grated ginger. Toss gently and let marinate for 10 minutes.
While the fish marinates, heat a small pan over medium heat, add a splash of oil, and caramelize the pineapple chunks until golden, about 2 minutes. Set aside.
In a separate bowl, combine diced cucumber relish, a pinch of sugar, vinegar, and a splash of water. Let the mixture sit for 5 minutes to absorb flavors.
After marination, combine the fish, caramelized pineapple, cucumber relish, chopped cilantro, and minced chili. Stir until well mixed.
Drizzle coconut milk over the ceviche, season with extra salt if needed, and mix gently.
Serve immediately over chilled small bowls or plates, garnished with extra cilantro leaves. Enjoy!
